_help: OPTIONAL hand-picked deals that should ALWAYS appear, regardless of the feeds. They are added first and win on de-duplication. Leave the 'deals' array empty to run a 100% automated, feed-only site. Use the same fields as a normal deal (see README).

deals.title: Up to 20% off TVs + up to $700 off soundbars
deals.desc: Jackpot Sale storewide: up to 20% off selected TVs (free gifts worth up to $1,888), up to $700 off soundbars, plus fridge, washer and Dyson deals. Selected models, while stocks last.

deals.title: 7% + 7% off sitewide with code GET7
deals.desc: Pre-07.07 Sale: stack 7% + 7% off sitewide with no minimum spend (capped at $99). Some brands excluded (Apple, Dyson, Sony and more). Online only.

deals.title: Limited-time voucher on selected tech & appliances

access.label: Online — voucher applied on selected products

deals.desc: Limited-time online voucher on selected products (valid 22 Jun to 26 Jul), running alongside the in-store Monster-Sized Sale of 8% off your 1st item and 10% off your 2nd.

deals.title: Microsoft 365 at $145 + 5% off notebooks
deals.desc: July notebook bundle: get Microsoft 365 for $145 with a selected notebook, plus a 5% off notebook coupon. Brands include Acer, ASUS, Lenovo and MSI.
